creator: obonilla@fisicc-ufm.edu
text:
kmp3 fails to compile with either qt-1.42 or qt-2.02

Fix: 

No Fix included.

	I no longer use the KDE and don't have the time/space to 
	fix this port. I request someone else takes over the
	Maintenance of this port.

	Thanks
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/audio/kmp3; make
